---
title: "flames_200kb_mapping"
output: html_document
date: "2026-03-20"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# asthma

## flames/200kb

```{r}
library(data.table)
sigsnps<-fread("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/Getting_started/data/GWAS/asthma/GCST010043/GCST010043_associations_export.tsv")
sigsnps



flames_scores<-read.table("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/Getting_started/data/FLAMES/asthma/flames_new/flames_final_score/FLAMES_scores.pred", header=TRUE, sep="\t")


library(dplyr)
library(purrr)

# 1. 提取 sigsnps 的 rsid（去掉等位基因后缀）
sigsnps <- sigsnps %>%
  mutate(rsid = sub("-[^-]+$", "", riskAllele))

# 2. 读取所有 flames_cs/*.tsv，记录 rsid → cs文件名
cs_dir <- "/project/xuanyao/jiaming/Getting_started/data/FLAMES/asthma/flames_new/flames_cs"
cs_files <- list.files(cs_dir, pattern = "\\.tsv$", full.names = TRUE)

cs_snp_map <- map_dfr(cs_files, function(f) {
  df <- read.table(f, header = TRUE, sep = "\t", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  if (!"indSigSNPs_str" %in% colnames(df)) return(NULL)
  snps <- trimws(unlist(strsplit(df$indSigSNPs_str, ";")))  # 改这里
  snps <- unique(snps)
  data.frame(rsid = snps, cs_file = basename(f), stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
})

# 3. FLAMES_scores.pred 提取 cs文件名（从路径中）

flames <- flames_scores  # 你的 FLAMES_scores.pred 读入的df
flames <- flames %>%
  mutate(cs_file = sub("\\.annot\\.txt$", "", basename(filename)))
sigsnps_coords <- sigsnps %>% dplyr::select(riskAllele, rsid, locations)

flames <- flames %>%
  mutate(cs_file = sub("^FLAMES_annotated_", "", basename(filename)))
# 4. 匹配：sigsnps rsid → cs_file → gene
result <- sigsnps %>%
  left_join(cs_snp_map, by = "rsid") %>%
  left_join(flames %>% dplyr::select(cs_file, symbol, ensg), by = "cs_file") %>%
  dplyr::select(riskAllele, rsid, cs_file, symbol, ensg)
result <- result %>% left_join(sigsnps_coords, by = c("riskAllele", "rsid"))%>%
  dplyr::distinct(riskAllele, rsid, symbol, ensg, locations, .keep_all = FALSE)
result

library(rtracklayer)

# 1. 读取GTF（只读gene行，省内存）
gtf <- rtracklayer::import("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/Getting_started/data/protein_coding_genes/Homo_sapiens.GRCh38.112.gtf.gz", 
                            feature.type = "gene")
gtf_df <- as.data.frame(gtf)
gtf_df <- gtf_df[, c("seqnames", "start", "end", "gene_id", "gene_name")]
colnames(gtf_df) <- c("chr", "start", "end", "ensg", "symbol")
gtf_df$chr <- as.character(gtf_df$chr)

# 2. 对unmapped SNP查200kb窗口

rsid_with_flames <- result %>%
  filter(!is.na(ensg)) %>%
  pull(rsid) %>%
  unique()

# 只对完全没有 FLAMES 基因的 rsid 做 200kb
unmapped <- result %>%
  filter(!rsid %in% rsid_with_flames) %>%
  distinct(riskAllele, rsid, locations) %>%
  mutate(
    chr   = sub(":.*", "", locations),
    pos   = as.integer(sub(".*:", "", locations)),
    start = pos - 100000,
    end   = pos + 100000
  )

cat("完全没有 FLAMES 匹配的 rsid 数量:", nrow(unmapped), "\n")

gene_window <- map_dfr(seq_len(nrow(unmapped)), function(i) {
  row <- unmapped[i, ]
  hits <- gtf_df %>%
    filter(chr == row$chr,
           end  >= row$start,
           start <= row$end)
  if (nrow(hits) == 0) return(NULL)
  hits %>%
    mutate(riskAllele = row$riskAllele,
           rsid       = row$rsid,
           cs_file    = NA_character_,
           source     = "200kb_window",
           locations  = row$locations) %>%
    dplyr::select(riskAllele, rsid, cs_file, symbol, ensg, source, locations)
})

result_final <- result %>%
  filter(!is.na(ensg)) %>%
  mutate(source = "FLAMES") %>%
  bind_rows(gene_window) %>%
  distinct(riskAllele, rsid, symbol, ensg, source, .keep_all = TRUE)

# 验证：应为 0
cat("同时有两种来源的 rsid 数:\n")
result_final %>%
  group_by(rsid) %>%
  summarise(n = n_distinct(source), .groups = "drop") %>%
  filter(n > 1) %>%
  nrow() %>%
  cat("\n")

result_final
```

```{r}
table(result_final$source)
result_final %>%
  distinct(rsid, source) %>%
  count(source)

```


## flames+200kb

```{r}
library(data.table)
sigsnps<-fread("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/Getting_started/data/GWAS/asthma/GCST010043/GCST010043_associations_export.tsv")
sigsnps
flames_scores<-read.table("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/Getting_started/data/FLAMES/asthma/flames_new/flames_final_score/FLAMES_scores.pred", header=TRUE, sep="\t")
library(dplyr)
library(purrr)

# 1. 提取 sigsnps 的 rsid（去掉等位基因后缀）
sigsnps <- sigsnps %>%
  mutate(rsid = sub("-[^-]+$", "", riskAllele))

# 2. 读取所有 flames_cs/*.tsv，记录 rsid → cs文件名
cs_dir <- "/project/xuanyao/jiaming/Getting_started/data/FLAMES/asthma/flames_new/flames_cs"
cs_files <- list.files(cs_dir, pattern = "\\.tsv$", full.names = TRUE)
cs_snp_map <- map_dfr(cs_files, function(f) {
  df <- read.table(f, header = TRUE, sep = "\t", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  if (!"indSigSNPs_str" %in% colnames(df)) return(NULL)
  snps <- trimws(unlist(strsplit(df$indSigSNPs_str, ";")))
  snps <- unique(snps)
  data.frame(rsid = snps, cs_file = basename(f), stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
})

# 3. FLAMES_scores.pred 提取 cs文件名（从路径中）
flames <- flames_scores
flames <- flames %>%
  mutate(cs_file = sub("\\.annot\\.txt$", "", basename(filename)))
sigsnps_coords <- sigsnps %>% dplyr::select(riskAllele, rsid, locations)
flames <- flames %>%
  mutate(cs_file = sub("^FLAMES_annotated_", "", basename(filename)))

# 4. 匹配：sigsnps rsid → cs_file → gene（FLAMES结果）
result <- sigsnps %>%
  left_join(cs_snp_map, by = "rsid") %>%
  left_join(flames %>% dplyr::select(cs_file, symbol, ensg), by = "cs_file") %>%
  dplyr::select(riskAllele, rsid, cs_file, symbol, ensg)
result <- result %>% 
  left_join(sigsnps_coords, by = c("riskAllele", "rsid")) %>%
  dplyr::distinct(riskAllele, rsid, symbol, ensg, locations, .keep_all = FALSE)

library(rtracklayer)

# 5. 读取GTF
gtf <- rtracklayer::import("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/Getting_started/data/protein_coding_genes/Homo_sapiens.GRCh38.112.gtf.gz", 
                            feature.type = "gene")
gtf_df <- as.data.frame(gtf)
gtf_df <- gtf_df[, c("seqnames", "start", "end", "gene_id", "gene_name")]
colnames(gtf_df) <- c("chr", "start", "end", "ensg", "symbol")
gtf_df$chr <- as.character(gtf_df$chr)

# 6. 对【所有】loci 做 200kb window 查询
all_loci <- sigsnps_coords %>%
  distinct(riskAllele, rsid, locations) %>%
  mutate(
    chr   = sub(":.*", "", locations),
    pos   = as.integer(sub(".*:", "", locations)),
    win_start = pos - 100000,
    win_end   = pos + 100000
  )

cat("总 loci 数量:", nrow(all_loci), "\n")

gene_window <- map_dfr(seq_len(nrow(all_loci)), function(i) {
  row <- all_loci[i, ]
  hits <- gtf_df %>%
    filter(chr == row$chr,
           end  >= row$win_start,
           start <= row$win_end)
  if (nrow(hits) == 0) return(NULL)
  hits %>%
    mutate(riskAllele = row$riskAllele,
           rsid       = row$rsid,
           cs_file    = NA_character_,
           source     = "200kb_window",
           locations  = row$locations) %>%
    dplyr::select(riskAllele, rsid, cs_file, symbol, ensg, source, locations)
})

# 7. FLAMES 结果加 source 标记
flames_result <- result %>%
  filter(!is.na(ensg)) %>%
  mutate(source = "FLAMES")

# 8. 取并集：FLAMES ∪ 200kb_window
result_final <- bind_rows(flames_result, gene_window) %>%
  distinct(riskAllele, rsid, symbol, ensg, source, .keep_all = TRUE)

# 统计
cat("FLAMES 来源条目数:", nrow(flames_result), "\n")
cat("200kb window 来源条目数:", nrow(gene_window), "\n")
cat("并集总条目数:", nrow(result_final), "\n")

# 同一 rsid+gene 同时被两种方法找到的数量
overlap <- result_final %>%
  group_by(rsid, symbol, ensg) %>%
  summarise(n_source = n_distinct(source), .groups = "drop") %>%
  filter(n_source > 1)
cat("同时被 FLAMES 和 200kb window 找到的 rsid-gene 对数:", nrow(overlap), "\n")

result_final
```

```{r}
table(result_final$source)
result_final %>%
  distinct(rsid, source) %>%
  count(source)
```




# MCH

## flames/200kb


```{r}
library(data.table)
sigsnps<-fread("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/Getting_started/data/GWAS/MCH/MCH_grch38.tsv")
sigsnps



flames_scores<-read.table("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/Getting_started/data/FLAMES/MCH/flames/flames_out/FLAMES_scores.pred", header=TRUE, sep="\t")


library(dplyr)
library(purrr)

# 1. 提取 sigsnps 的 rsid（去掉等位基因后缀）
sigsnps <- sigsnps %>%
  mutate(rsid = sub("-[^-]+$", "", riskAllele))

# 2. 读取所有 flames_cs/*.tsv，记录 rsid → cs文件名
cs_dir <- "/project/xuanyao/jiaming/Getting_started/data/FLAMES/MCH/flames/flames_cs"
cs_files <- list.files(cs_dir, pattern = "\\.tsv$", full.names = TRUE)

cs_snp_map <- map_dfr(cs_files, function(f) {
  df <- read.table(f, header = TRUE, sep = "\t", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  if (!"indSigSNPs_str" %in% colnames(df)) return(NULL)
  snps <- trimws(unlist(strsplit(df$indSigSNPs_str, ";")))  # 改这里
  snps <- unique(snps)
  data.frame(rsid = snps, cs_file = basename(f), stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
})

# 3. FLAMES_scores.pred 提取 cs文件名（从路径中）

flames <- flames_scores  # 你的 FLAMES_scores.pred 读入的df
flames <- flames %>%
  mutate(cs_file = sub("\\.annot\\.txt$", "", basename(filename)))
sigsnps_coords <- sigsnps %>% dplyr::select(riskAllele, rsid, locations)
# 4. 匹配：sigsnps rsid → cs_file → gene
result <- sigsnps %>%
  left_join(cs_snp_map, by = "rsid") %>%
  left_join(flames %>% dplyr::select(cs_file, symbol, ensg), by = "cs_file") %>%
  dplyr::select(riskAllele, rsid, cs_file, symbol, ensg)
result <- result %>% left_join(sigsnps_coords, by = c("riskAllele", "rsid"))%>%
  dplyr::distinct(riskAllele, rsid, symbol, ensg, locations, .keep_all = FALSE)
result

library(rtracklayer)

# 1. 读取GTF（只读gene行，省内存）
gtf <- rtracklayer::import("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/Getting_started/data/protein_coding_genes/Homo_sapiens.GRCh38.112.gtf.gz", 
                            feature.type = "gene")
gtf_df <- as.data.frame(gtf)
gtf_df <- gtf_df[, c("seqnames", "start", "end", "gene_id", "gene_name")]
colnames(gtf_df) <- c("chr", "start", "end", "ensg", "symbol")
gtf_df$chr <- as.character(gtf_df$chr)

# 2. 对unmapped SNP查200kb窗口

rsid_with_flames <- result %>%
  filter(!is.na(ensg)) %>%
  pull(rsid) %>%
  unique()

# 只对完全没有 FLAMES 基因的 rsid 做 200kb
unmapped <- result %>%
  filter(!rsid %in% rsid_with_flames) %>%
  distinct(riskAllele, rsid, locations) %>%
  mutate(
    chr   = sub(":.*", "", locations),
    pos   = as.integer(sub(".*:", "", locations)),
    start = pos - 100000,
    end   = pos + 100000
  )

cat("完全没有 FLAMES 匹配的 rsid 数量:", nrow(unmapped), "\n")

gene_window <- map_dfr(seq_len(nrow(unmapped)), function(i) {
  row <- unmapped[i, ]
  hits <- gtf_df %>%
    filter(chr == row$chr,
           end  >= row$start,
           start <= row$end)
  if (nrow(hits) == 0) return(NULL)
  hits %>%
    mutate(riskAllele = row$riskAllele,
           rsid       = row$rsid,
           cs_file    = NA_character_,
           source     = "200kb_window",
           locations  = row$locations) %>%
    dplyr::select(riskAllele, rsid, cs_file, symbol, ensg, source, locations)
})

result_final <- result %>%
  filter(!is.na(ensg)) %>%
  mutate(source = "FLAMES") %>%
  bind_rows(gene_window) %>%
  distinct(riskAllele, rsid, symbol, ensg, source, .keep_all = TRUE)

# 验证：应为 0
cat("同时有两种来源的 rsid 数:\n")
result_final %>%
  group_by(rsid) %>%
  summarise(n = n_distinct(source), .groups = "drop") %>%
  filter(n > 1) %>%
  nrow() %>%
  cat("\n")
result_final
```


```{r}
table(result_final$source)
result_final %>%
  distinct(rsid, source) %>%
  count(source)
```


## flames+200kb

```{r}
library(data.table)
sigsnps <- fread("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/Getting_started/data/GWAS/MCH/MCH_grch38.tsv")
flames_scores <- read.table("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/Getting_started/data/FLAMES/MCH/flames/flames_out/FLAMES_scores.pred", header=TRUE, sep="\t")
library(dplyr)
library(purrr)

# 1. 提取 sigsnps 的 rsid
sigsnps <- sigsnps %>%
  mutate(rsid = sub("-[^-]+$", "", riskAllele))

# 2. 读取所有 flames_cs/*.tsv，记录 rsid → cs文件名
cs_dir <- "/project/xuanyao/jiaming/Getting_started/data/FLAMES/MCH/flames/flames_cs"
cs_files <- list.files(cs_dir, pattern = "\\.tsv$", full.names = TRUE)
cs_snp_map <- map_dfr(cs_files, function(f) {
  df <- read.table(f, header = TRUE, sep = "\t", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  if (!"indSigSNPs_str" %in% colnames(df)) return(NULL)
  snps <- trimws(unlist(strsplit(df$indSigSNPs_str, ";")))
  snps <- unique(snps)
  data.frame(rsid = snps, cs_file = basename(f), stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
})

# 3. 提取 cs_file 名
flames <- flames_scores %>%
  mutate(cs_file = sub("\\.annot\\.txt$", "", basename(filename)))

sigsnps_coords <- sigsnps %>% dplyr::select(riskAllele, rsid, locations)

# 4. FLAMES 匹配结果
result <- sigsnps %>%
  left_join(cs_snp_map, by = "rsid") %>%
  left_join(flames %>% dplyr::select(cs_file, symbol, ensg), by = "cs_file") %>%
  dplyr::select(riskAllele, rsid, cs_file, symbol, ensg) %>%
  left_join(sigsnps_coords, by = c("riskAllele", "rsid")) %>%
  dplyr::distinct(riskAllele, rsid, symbol, ensg, locations, .keep_all = FALSE)

library(rtracklayer)

# 5. 读取 GTF
gtf <- rtracklayer::import("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/Getting_started/data/protein_coding_genes/Homo_sapiens.GRCh38.112.gtf.gz",
                            feature.type = "gene")
gtf_df <- as.data.frame(gtf)[, c("seqnames", "start", "end", "gene_id", "gene_name")]
colnames(gtf_df) <- c("chr", "start", "end", "ensg", "symbol")
gtf_df$chr <- as.character(gtf_df$chr)

# 6. 对【所有】loci 做 200kb window
all_loci <- sigsnps_coords %>%
  distinct(riskAllele, rsid, locations) %>%
  mutate(
    chr      = sub(":.*", "", locations),
    pos      = as.integer(sub(".*:", "", locations)),
    win_start = pos - 100000,
    win_end   = pos + 100000
  )

cat("总 loci 数量:", nrow(all_loci), "\n")

gene_window <- map_dfr(seq_len(nrow(all_loci)), function(i) {
  row <- all_loci[i, ]
  hits <- gtf_df %>%
    filter(chr == row$chr,
           end  >= row$win_start,
           start <= row$win_end)
  if (nrow(hits) == 0) return(NULL)
  hits %>%
    mutate(riskAllele = row$riskAllele,
           rsid       = row$rsid,
           cs_file    = NA_character_,
           source     = "200kb_window",
           locations  = row$locations) %>%
    dplyr::select(riskAllele, rsid, cs_file, symbol, ensg, source, locations)
})

# 7. FLAMES 结果加 source 标记
flames_result <- result %>%
  filter(!is.na(ensg)) %>%
  mutate(source = "FLAMES")

# 8. 并集
result_final <- bind_rows(flames_result, gene_window) %>%
  distinct(riskAllele, rsid, symbol, ensg, source, .keep_all = TRUE)

# 统计
cat("FLAMES 来源条目数:", nrow(flames_result), "\n")
cat("200kb window 来源条目数:", nrow(gene_window), "\n")
cat("并集总条目数:", nrow(result_final), "\n")

overlap <- result_final %>%
  group_by(rsid, symbol, ensg) %>%
  summarise(n_source = n_distinct(source), .groups = "drop") %>%
  filter(n_source > 1)
cat("同时被两种方法找到的 rsid-gene 对数:", nrow(overlap), "\n")

result_final
```





```{r}
table(result_final$source)
result_final %>%
  distinct(rsid, source) %>%
  count(source)
```


```{r}
mch_gwas_genes<-result_final$ensg
mch_gwas_genes <- paste0("gRNA:", result_final$ensg)
```




```{r}
# ── 测试版 ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
setwd("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/Getting_started")

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(sceptre)
  library(readr)
  library(dplyr)
  library(Matrix)
  library(ondisc)
})

sceptre_obj <- read_ondisc_backed_sceptre_object(
  sceptre_object_fp = "/project/xuanyao/zining/data/perturb_seq/cd4_perturb_seq/Stim8hr_merged_sgRNA/sceptre_object_donor_only.rds",
  response_odm_file_fp = "/project/xuanyao/zining/data/perturb_seq/cd4_perturb_seq/Stim8hr_merged_sgRNA/gene.odm",
  grna_odm_file_fp = "/project/xuanyao/zining/data/perturb_seq/cd4_perturb_seq/Stim8hr_merged_sgRNA/grna.odm")

print("construct sceptre object success!")

# ── 1. 读取 & 匹配 ─────────────────────────────────────────────
Repologle_associated_genes <- readRDS(
  "/project/xuanyao/jiaming/Getting_started/data/GWAS/asthma/GCST010043/flames+200kb/CDT4_associated_perturbation.rds")

grna_names     <- rownames(sceptre_obj@grna_matrix[[1]])
covariate_full <- sceptre_obj@covariate_data_frame
grna_base      <- sub("-\\d+$", "", grna_names)

MCH_guide_idx     <- which(grna_base %in% Repologle_associated_genes)
MCH_guide_targets <- grna_base[MCH_guide_idx]

NTC_guide_idx <- grep("^NTC-", grna_names, ignore.case = TRUE)
NTC_names     <- grna_names[NTC_guide_idx]

# ── ★ 测试：只取前3个target，前2个NTC ─────────────────────────
unique_targets <- unique(MCH_guide_targets)[1:3]
NTC_guide_idx  <- NTC_guide_idx[1:2]
NTC_names      <- NTC_names[1:2]

print(paste("TEST targets:", paste(unique_targets, collapse = ", ")))
print(paste("TEST NTC:", paste(NTC_names, collapse = ", ")))


# ── 2. 找cells ────────────────────────────────────────────────
target_cells_list <- vector("list", length(unique_targets))
names(target_cells_list) <- unique_targets

for (tgt in unique_targets) {
  guide_idxs <- MCH_guide_idx[MCH_guide_targets == tgt]
  cells <- c()
  for (gi in guide_idxs) {
    cells <- union(cells, which(sceptre_obj@grna_matrix[[1]][gi, ] != 0))
  }
  target_cells_list[[tgt]] <- cells
  message("target=", tgt, " cells=", length(cells))
}

NTC_cells_list <- vector("list", length(NTC_guide_idx))
names(NTC_cells_list) <- NTC_names

for (k in seq_along(NTC_guide_idx)) {
  gi <- NTC_guide_idx[k]
  NTC_cells_list[[k]] <- which(sceptre_obj@grna_matrix[[1]][gi, ] != 0)
  message("NTC=", NTC_names[k], " cells=", length(NTC_cells_list[[k]]))
}

all_needed_cells <- sort(unique(c(unlist(target_cells_list), unlist(NTC_cells_list))))
print(paste("Total cells:", length(all_needed_cells)))

# ★ 建立全局cell index → exp_mat列名的映射
cell_index_to_colname <- as.character(all_needed_cells)
names(cell_index_to_colname) <- as.character(all_needed_cells)

# ── 3. 只读前50个gene做测试 ───────────────────────────────────
n_genes    <- 50
gene_names <- rownames(sceptre_obj@response_matrix[[1]])[1:n_genes]

exp_list <- vector("list", n_genes)
for (k in seq_len(n_genes)) {
  row_full      <- sceptre_obj@response_matrix[[1]][k, ]
  exp_list[[k]] <- row_full[all_needed_cells]
  if (k %% 10 == 0) message("gene ", k, "/", n_genes)
}

exp_mat <- do.call(rbind, exp_list)
rownames(exp_mat) <- gene_names
colnames(exp_mat) <- as.character(all_needed_cells)  # 列名 = 全局cell index的字符串

print(paste("exp_mat dim:", nrow(exp_mat), "x", ncol(exp_mat)))
print(paste("colnames sample:", paste(head(colnames(exp_mat), 5), collapse=", ")))


# ── 4. Train/test split ───────────────────────────────────────
n_targets <- length(unique_targets)
n_NTC     <- length(NTC_cells_list)

response_train_list <- vector("list", n_targets + n_NTC)
response_test_list  <- vector("list", n_targets)
cov_train_list      <- vector("list", n_targets + n_NTC)
guide_names_out     <- character(n_targets + n_NTC)

for (k in seq_along(unique_targets)) {
  tgt     <- unique_targets[k]
  cells   <- target_cells_list[[tgt]]  # 全局cell index
  n       <- length(cells)
  cells_s <- sample(cells, n)
  n_train <- floor(n / 2)

  train_cells <- cells_s[seq_len(n_train)]
  test_cells  <- cells_s[(n_train + 1):n]

  # ★ 关键修复：用as.character转换，与colnames(exp_mat)一致
  train_cols <- as.character(train_cells)
  test_cols  <- as.character(test_cells)

  # ★ 验证所有cells都在exp_mat中
  stopifnot(all(train_cols %in% colnames(exp_mat)))
  stopifnot(all(test_cols  %in% colnames(exp_mat)))

  response_train_list[[k]] <- exp_mat[, train_cols, drop = FALSE]
  response_test_list[[k]]  <- exp_mat[, test_cols,  drop = FALSE]
  cov_train_list[[k]]      <- covariate_full[train_cells, , drop = FALSE]
  guide_names_out[k]       <- tgt
  message("target=", tgt, " train=", n_train, " test=", n - n_train)
}

for (k in seq_along(NTC_cells_list)) {
  pos        <- n_targets + k
  cells      <- NTC_cells_list[[k]]
  cell_cols  <- as.character(cells)
  stopifnot(all(cell_cols %in% colnames(exp_mat)))
  response_train_list[[pos]] <- exp_mat[, cell_cols, drop = FALSE]
  cov_train_list[[pos]]      <- covariate_full[cells, , drop = FALSE]
  guide_names_out[pos]       <- NTC_names[k]
}


# ── 5. 合并 & 检查 ────────────────────────────────────────────
response_OPERA  <- do.call(cbind, response_train_list)
covariate_OPERA <- do.call(rbind, cov_train_list)

ncols_each    <- sapply(response_train_list, ncol)
guide_per_col <- rep(guide_names_out, times = ncols_each)

i <- match(guide_per_col, guide_names_out)
j <- seq_along(guide_per_col)

guide_by_col <- sparseMatrix(
  i = i, j = j, x = 1L,
  dims = c(length(guide_names_out), length(guide_per_col)),
  dimnames = list(guide_names_out, colnames(response_OPERA))
)

response_topic <- do.call(cbind, response_test_list)
rownames(response_topic) <- gene_names
rownames(response_OPERA)  <- gene_names

# ── ★ 结果检查 ────────────────────────────────────────────────
print("=== TEST RESULTS ===")
print(paste("response_OPERA dim:", nrow(response_OPERA), "x", ncol(response_OPERA)))
print(paste("covariate_OPERA dim:", nrow(covariate_OPERA), "x", ncol(covariate_OPERA)))
print(paste("guide_by_col dim:", nrow(guide_by_col), "x", ncol(guide_by_col)))
print(paste("response_topic dim:", nrow(response_topic), "x", ncol(response_topic)))
print("guide rownames:"); print(rownames(guide_by_col))
print("cells per guide:"); print(rowSums(guide_by_col))
print("TEST PASSED!")
```
